since_last: 33% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.83%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -1.25% · Gold -0.31% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 33% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.83%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.83%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.23%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -6.90%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +2.24%, WDAY +1.94%, GOOGL +1.62%, NOW +1.49%, INTU +1.41%. Laggards: SKHY -6.90%, ARM -4.04%, TSM -3.83%, DELL -3.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.05% at $135.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
